title: Add Hunting to Recreation & Outdoors section

requirements.summary: Add 'Hunting' as a recreation activity entry in the Recreation & Outdoors page, following the same card/section format used by existing activities (snowmobiling, fishing, hiking, etc.)
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Hunting' section/card appears on the Recreation & Outdoors page alongside existing activities.
The hunting entry includes a title, descriptive text, and bullet-point highlights consistent with other activity entries.
The visual style matches the existing Northern Maine theme (deep forest greens, slate grays, amber accents).
No existing recreation activities are removed or altered.

file_operations.description: Add a new 'Hunting' activity section to the recreation activities list. Include a title, descriptive paragraph about hunting opportunities in the Jackman, Maine area, and a bullet-point list highlighting key hunting features (e.g., deer, moose, bear, upland bird seasons). Follow the exact same card/section structure, styling, and layout pattern used by existing activities (snowmobiling, fishing, hiking, paddling, camping, wildlife) to maintain visual consistency with the Northern Maine theme.
